channel.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
channel.description:
🎉 We are incredibly excited to announce that Frontity has raised **€1M in funding** to further our mission to help build performant, scalable websites with WordPress and React easily.
The funding round has been led by **Automattic** (the parent company of WordPress.com and WooCommerce) and the venture capital firm **K Fund**, and it will help us continue to develop the framework, roll out new features faster, and grow our community by providing more resources to learn and collaborate.
To read more about the funding and where we’re going, **please check out our blog post**:
https://frontity.org/blog/announcing-frontitys-e1m-funding-round-with-automattic-and-k-fund/
Thank you to our **amazing community** for joining and supporting us on this journey! 🙌

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: Pablo
item.description:
Thanks for your support @ShaGui!

Read full topic

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
Congratulations for the great news! It is well earned with the team working very hard to make Frontity a great framework! Can’t wait to see what the future holds!

Read full topic

Thanks for your kind words @alen @daxcastellon and @mosamlife

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: daxcastellon
item.description:
Congrats! Well deserved! Keep up the good work!

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: alen
item.description:
Yes, that’s awesome - I’m keeping my eye on you for some time now, and this wasn’t huge surprise to me, since I recognized Frontity as meaningful and serious project. And so did the Automattic, which makes me think I’m right!
Congratulations!
I’m sorry that I didn’t contribute so far (time, who could spare some …), but now I’ll definitely will make some time now.
I’m especially interested in WooCommerce part of all of this …

Congrats again, and best of luck!

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: mosamlife
item.description:
Awesome! Congratulations

Read full topic

item.title: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
item.dc:creator: Reyes
item.description:
We are incredibly excited to announce that Frontity has raised €1M in funding to further our mission to help build performant, scalable websites with WordPress and React easily.

The funding round has been led by Automattic (the parent company of WordPress.com and WooCommerce) and the venture capital firm K Fund, and it will help us continue to develop the framework, roll out new features faster, and grow our community by providing more resources to learn and collaborate.

To read more about the funding and where we’re going, please check out our blog post:

frontity.org

Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund - Frontity...

We are thrilled to announce that Frontity has raised a €1M funding round led by Automattic, the parent company of WordPress.com and WooCommerce, and the venture capital firm K Fund,

Thank you to our amazing community for joining and supporting us on this journey!

Read full topic
item.source: Announcing Frontity’s €1M Funding Round with Automattic and K Fund
